note: Derived read to compute per team, so figures reconcile across the league.
pythagorean_expected_wins: basketball Pythagorean: expected win share = points_for^13.91 / (points_for^13.91 + points_against^13.91), times the games played (82). The gap between actual wins and this expectation flags a team that beat or fell short of its scoring margin, usually a clutch or close-game signal.
